SEARCH
Package kp.company.controller.mvc

Class DepartmentMvcTests

java.lang.Object
kp.company.controller.mvc.DepartmentMvcTests
@SpringBootTest @AutoConfigureMockMvc class DepartmentMvcTests extends Object
The tests for the Department with server-side support using MockMvc.
The server is not started.

These tests use the 'Spring MVC Test Framework'.
Loads a web application context and provides a mock web environment.
The full Spring application context is started, but without the server.

    Should find all the Departments on the third page.
    Tests a GET request.

    Should get '400 Bad Request' error response when searching with bad id.
    Tests a GET request.

    Should get '404 Not Found' error response when searching with the absent Department.
    Tests a GET request.

    Tests a PATCH request.
